name: Shrimp Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except shrimp in the chicken stock.
2. Bring mixture to a boil over medium heat.
3. Reduce heat and cover; simmer for 45 minutes.
4. Add shrimp and continue to simmer for an additional 30 minutes.
5. Adjust wine quantity as desired (e.g., reducing to 1 cup if less preferred).
6. Remove from heat and serve immediately.
